description:
MedAide+ V2 Benchmark — Composite-Intent Evaluation Dataset.
1.5× scale of original MedAide paper (arXiv:2410.12532v3) Section 4.1 protocol.
4 categories × 750 instances = 3000 total instances.
Matches 18-intent taxonomy (17 original + Follow_up_Scheduling).
Enhanced with difficulty levels, clinical context, and expanded template diversity.
